description_long: This is a two-tiered cake with a rich chocolate ganache dripping over the edges of both layers. The cake features alternating light and dark horizontal layers, suggesting a combination of chocolate and vanilla or caramel sponge. Three lit candles are inserted into the top tier, each with a small flame, and a single chocolate wafer stick is embedded into the side of the upper tier. The overall shape is cylindrical with slightly beveled edges, and the chocolate ganache appears glossy and thick. The cake is not displayed on any visible plate or stand, and the decorations are simple yet festive, making it suitable for celebrations.
description: A two-tiered cake with glossy chocolate ganache, three lit candles, and a chocolate wafer stick, featuring alternating sponge layers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three lit candles on top and the chocolate wafer stick protruding from the right side of the upper tier.
description_view_1: Side view with the wafer stick clearly visible on the left and all three candles seen from a different angle.
description_view_2: Rear view with the candles visible but the wafer stick not in sight, highlighting the layered structure and ganache drips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the wafer stick now on the right, and the candles seen from behind.
